'''M. Shayne Bell''' is a science fiction author who has written three short stories for the [[Star Wars]] universe. The stories were published in ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'', and ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]''.

{{Author-stub}}

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{StoryCite|story=Drawing the Maps of Peace: The Moisture Farmer's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' (1995)
*{{StoryCite|story=Of the Day's Annoyances: Bib Fortuna's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} for ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' (1996)
*{{StoryCite|story=Of Possible Futures: The Tale of Zuckuss and 4-LOM|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} for ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]'' (1996)
